examples.en: A famous entrepreneur who achieved overnight success online decided to invest in a groundbreaking train linking two metropolitan areas.
examples.linking: A famous‿entrepreneur who‿achieved‿overnight success‿online decided to‿invest‿in‿a groundbreaking train linking two metropolitan‿areas.
tips: 連結: invest‿in=インヴェスティン, achieved‿overnight, in‿a
弱形: a/who/to(=/tə/)/in
強勢: FA·mous, entrepre·NEUR, suc·CESS, in·VEST, GROUND·breaking
注意音: R(entrepreneur/areas/train), entrepreneur=アントレプレ·ヌァ

examples.en: But there were obstacles. Tickets might be too exorbitant for ordinary people to afford.
examples.linking: But there‿were‿obstacles. Tickets might be too‿exorbitant for‿ordinary people to‿afford.
tips: 連結: there‿were, were‿obstacles, too‿exorbitant
弱形: there/were(=/wə/)/for(=/fə/)/to(=/tə/)
強勢: OB·stacles, TI·ckets, ex·OR·bitant, OR·dinary, af·FORD
注意音: R(there/exorbitant/ordinary/afford), TH(there)

items.collocation: can't afford to…, afford a ticket

examples.en: But there were obstacles. Tickets might be too exorbitant for ordinary people to afford.
examples.linking: But there‿were‿obstacles. Tickets might be too‿exorbitant for‿ordinary people to‿afford.
tips: 連結: there‿were, were‿obstacles, too‿exorbitant

強勢: OB·stacles, TI·ckets, ex·OR·bitant, OR·dinary, af·FORD

items.collocation: sway public opinion, persuade sb to…

examples.en: Until the company can persuade local governments to authorise the project, the train of the future stays on the drawing board.
examples.linking: Until the company can persuade local governments to‿authorise the project, the train‿of the future stays‿on the drawing board.
tips: 連結: train‿of, stays‿on=ステイゾン
弱形: the/can(=/kən/)/to(=/tə/)/of(=/əv/)
強勢: COM·pany, per·SUADE, AU·thorise, PRO·ject, DRAW·ing BOARD
注意音: R(persuade/authorise/project/train/board), TH(the)

items.front: like something from the pages of a novel

pron.tts: like something from the pages of a novel

passage.jp: オンラインで一夜にして成功した有名な起業家が、二つの大都市圏を結ぶ画期的な列車に投資することを決めた。だが障害があった。運賃は一般の人が払えないほど法外かもしれない。会社が地元政府を説得して計画を認可させるまで、未来の列車は設計図のままだ。
